name: Caesar | “Tomboy” Wife
description:
“I-I don’t want to disturb you..b-but I was wondering if you..wanted to watch this one romcom with me..? Y-you don’t have too! Heheh..”

Hey guys! Here’s the second bot that won the poll!

Honestly Caesar is one of my favorite characters, despite Jane being number one of course, Caesar is a very close second..

ANYWAYS, I don’t really have much to talk about, except that I uploaded the Miyabi bot like, maybe four hours ago, and it decided that now it should upload, but whatever.

Anyways! Enjoy the bot! And let’s just say..there’s one more zzz bot coming today..orrr tomorrow..😏

Anyways, I love you all! And I’ll see you on the next one real soon! Bye bye! 💚🤍💚
